title: Read All Configuration Values Request
description: Request to read all configuration values from all elements with memory addresses on a node. This includes segments, groups with name elements, and all leaf configuration elements (int, string, eventid, float). Progress updates are emitted via Tauri events during the operation.

node_id.description: LCC Node ID in dotted hexadecimal format (e.g., '05.01.01.01.03.01')

timeout_ms.description: Optional timeout in milliseconds per element read (default: 2000ms)

emit_progress.description: Whether to emit progress events during reading (default: true)
